chunks.text: ORDER SHEET I N T HE HI G H CO U R T O F S I N DH B E N C H AT S U K K U R Cr. Misc. Appln. No. S – 111 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of MA No.956/2025 (S/A) 28.11.2025 Mr. Qurban Ali Malano, Advocate along with Inspector Zaman Awan Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General SindhSyed Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi, Additional PG for the State >>>>>..<<<<< Counsel for the applicant submits that finally the case has been challaned, therefore, the instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application has served its purpose, hence he does not press instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application, which is not opposed by other side. Order accordingly. Judge ARBROHI/PS
